releases.name: v0.46
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Fix incorrect scientific notation rendering for large ints by @NJAldwin
* Add opt-in config checksum annotation for auto pod restarts by @NJAldwin
* Fix TCP keepalive configuration by @NJAldwin **breaking change**
* Add plugin support

## New Contributors
* @NJAldwin made their first contribution in https://github.com/pgdogdev/helm/pull/75

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pgdogdev/helm/compare/v0.45...v0.46

openIssues.title: Support `priorityClassName`
openIssues.author: rbozan

openIssues.title: TLS certificates
openIssues.author: lc-guy

openIssues.title: Ability to reference adminpw / databases as a secret
openIssues.author: lc-guy

name: pgdog
description: PostgreSQL connection pooler, load balancer and database sharder.

releases.name: v0.1.32
releases.body:
## What's Changed

* feat: weighted load balancing
* fix: schema sharding in session mode with `cross_shard_disabled`
* feat: add configurable log format and level by @levish0

## New Contributors
* @levish0 made their first contribution in https://github.com/pgdogdev/pgdog/pull/822

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pgdogdev/pgdog/compare/v0.1.31...v0.1.32

mergedPRs.title: feat: add primary only plugin
mergedPRs.author: levkk
mergedPRs.body:
```
pgdog=# EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM sessions;
                               QUERY PLAN                               
------------------------------------------------------------------------
 Seq Scan on sessions  (cost=0.00..32.60 rows=2260 width=8)
 
 PgDog Routing:
   Summary: shard=0 role=primary
   Shard 0: SELECT omnishard round robin
   Note: plugin pgdog_primary_only_tables adjusted routing role=primary
(6 rows)
```

#823

mergedPRs.title: fix: fix ee error tracking for replication
mergedPRs.author: levkk
mergedPRs.body:
- fix: fix copy data error tracking (happens at `CopyDone`)
- chore: add replication slot tracking

mergedPRs.title: fix: schema sharding in session mode with cross_shard_disabled
mergedPRs.author: levkk
mergedPRs.body:
- Transactions were not correctly identified as direct-to-shard in schema sharding and session mode
- Session mode clients could get stuck disconnecting

mergedPRs.title: chore: add more tracking to resharding
mergedPRs.author: levkk
mergedPRs.body:
- chore: added more hooks to track resharding progress in EE
- feat: show _all_ schema sync statements in `SHOW SCHEMA_SYNC` and update their progress as they are actually executed
